name: High-Flow Engine Air Filter
description:
High-flow engine air filter for increased horsepower and throttle response. Oiled cotton gauze design allows more airflow than stock.

  • Oiled cotton gauze media
  • Up to 50% more airflow
  • Washable and reusable
  • Lifetime warranty

Universal fit with vehicle-specific adapter brackets included.
warranty:
This part carries a 12-month / 12,000-mile limited warranty (whichever comes first) against manufacturing defects and premature wear under normal vehicle use.

Defective parts will be repaired or replaced free of charge; proof of professional installation may be required for certain components. Contact us with your order number and part details to begin a claim.

reviews.name: HP Seeker
reviews.text: Throttle response improved noticeably. Worth every dollar.
reviews.title: Noticeable difference

category_details.name: Engine Parts
category_details.description: OEM and aftermarket engine components for all makes and models. From filters and spark plugs to gaskets and sensors — keep your engine running clean and strong.

category_details.name: Oil Filters
category_details.description: High-capacity oil filters that trap contaminants and protect your engine. OEM-fit and performance upgrade options for every vehicle.

category_details.name: Filters by Type
category_details.description: Choose the right oil filter housing style for your engine — spin-on canister filters for most vehicles, cartridge filters for European engines, and extended-life options for high-mileage vehicles.

category_details.name: Spin-On Oil Filters
category_details.description: Traditional canister-style spin-on oil filters for most domestic and Asian vehicles. Easy installation with built-in anti-drainback valve and bypass valve.

category_details.name: Cartridge Oil Filters
category_details.description: Replaceable cartridge filter elements used in most European vehicles. Eco-friendly design reduces metal waste compared to spin-on filters.

category_details.name: High-Mileage Oil Filters
category_details.description: Extended-capacity oil filters engineered for high-mileage engines (75,000+ miles). Enhanced media traps smaller contaminants for longer engine life.

category_details.name: Air Filters
category_details.description: Engine air filters and cabin air filters for optimal airflow and clean air inside the vehicle. Washable and replaceable options available.

category_details.name: Filters by Application
category_details.description: Engine intake air filters for combustion, cabin air filters for HVAC system, and performance cold-air intake systems for added horsepower.

category_details.name: Engine Air Filters
category_details.description: Paper, cotton, and synthetic engine air filters that protect your engine from dust and debris. OEM-fit replacements for every vehicle.

category_details.name: Cabin Air Filters
category_details.description: HEPA and activated-carbon cabin air filters that clean the air inside your vehicle. Removes pollen, dust, smoke, and odors.

category_details.name: Performance Cold-Air Intakes
category_details.description: High-flow cold-air intake systems with washable filters for added horsepower and improved throttle response.

category_details.name: Spark Plugs
category_details.description: Copper, platinum, and iridium spark plugs for reliable ignition. Cold-start performance in all weather conditions.

category_details.name: Plugs by Electrode Material
category_details.description: Match electrode material to your driving needs — copper for budget OEM replacement, platinum for long life, iridium for high-performance applications.

category_details.name: Copper Spark Plugs
category_details.description: Standard copper-core spark plugs for OEM replacement. Affordable and reliable for everyday driving up to 30,000 miles.

category_details.name: Platinum Spark Plugs
category_details.description: Single and double platinum spark plugs for extended service life up to 60,000 miles. Improved cold-start performance.

category_details.name: Iridium Spark Plugs
category_details.description: Premium iridium spark plugs with fine-wire center electrode. 100,000+ mile service life and optimal ignition for high-compression engines.

category_details.name: Fuel Filters
category_details.description: In-line and in-tank fuel filters that protect your fuel system from water and debris. Essential for diesel and high-performance engines.

category_details.name: Filters by Fuel Type
category_details.description: Gasoline fuel filters for standard combustion engines and diesel fuel filters with water-separation technology for compression-ignition engines.

category_details.name: Gasoline Fuel Filters
category_details.description: In-line and in-tank gasoline fuel filters with micron ratings from 10 to 40 microns. OEM-fit for cars, trucks, and SUVs.

category_details.name: Diesel Fuel Filters
category_details.description: Heavy-duty diesel fuel filters with built-in water separators. Essential for protecting injection pumps and common-rail injectors.

category_details.name: Brakes
category_details.description: Complete brake system components — pads, rotors, calipers, and brake lines. Safety-rated for daily driving and performance applications.

category_details.name: Brake Pads
category_details.description: Ceramic, semi-metallic, and organic brake pads for quiet, dust-free stopping power. OEM replacement and performance upgrade options.

category_details.name: Pads by Compound
category_details.description: Choose the right friction compound for your driving style — ceramic for quiet daily driving, semi-metallic for towing and heavy use, organic for budget OEM replacement.

category_details.name: Ceramic Brake Pads
category_details.description: Premium ceramic brake pads for quiet, dust-free stopping. Ideal for daily driving and luxury vehicles. Extended rotor life.

category_details.name: Semi-Metallic Brake Pads
category_details.description: Heavy-duty semi-metallic brake pads for trucks, SUVs, and towing applications. Excellent stopping power under high heat.

category_details.name: Organic Brake Pads
category_details.description: Non-asbestos organic (NAO) brake pads for budget-friendly OEM replacement. Quiet operation and gentle on rotors.

category_details.name: Brake Rotors
category_details.description: Drilled, slotted, and standard brake rotors for heat dissipation and consistent braking. Vented and cross-drilled designs for performance.

category_details.name: Rotors by Style
category_details.description: Smooth-face vented rotors for daily driving, drilled-and-slotted rotors for improved cooling, and cross-drilled performance rotors for track and racing.

category_details.name: Standard Vented Rotors
category_details.description: OEM-style vented brake rotors with smooth friction surface. Direct-fit replacement for daily driving.

category_details.name: Drilled & Slotted Rotors
category_details.description: Cross-drilled and slotted brake rotors for improved heat dissipation and wet-weather performance. Reduce brake fade under heavy use.

category_details.name: Performance Cross-Drilled Rotors
category_details.description: Premium cross-drilled performance rotors with zinc-coated finish. Ideal for track days, autocross, and high-performance street use.

category_details.name: Brake Calipers
category_details.description: Remanufactured and new brake calipers with compatible mounting hardware. Powder-coated finishes for corrosion resistance.

category_details.name: Calipers by Type
category_details.description: OEM-replacement calipers for direct-fit installation and high-performance big-brake calipers for upgraded stopping power.

category_details.name: OE Replacement Calipers
category_details.description: Remanufactured OEM-fit brake calipers with new seals, pistons, and bleeder screws. Includes mounting hardware kit.

category_details.name: Performance Big-Brake Calipers
category_details.description: 4-piston and 6-piston performance brake calipers with anodized finish. Compatible with upgraded big-brake kits.

category_details.name: Suspension
category_details.description: Shocks, struts, springs, and suspension links for a smooth, controlled ride. Restore factory handling and eliminate bouncing or swaying.

category_details.name: Shocks & Struts
category_details.description: Gas-charged shock absorbers and complete strut assemblies for precise handling and comfort. Direct-fit for easy installation.

category_details.name: Shocks by Application
category_details.description: Match shock absorbers to driving conditions — daily driving for comfort, performance for sport handling, off-road for lifted trucks and SUVs.

category_details.name: Daily Driving Shocks
category_details.description: OEM-replacement gas-charged shocks tuned for comfort and quiet daily driving. Twin-tube design for plush ride quality.

category_details.name: Performance Shocks
category_details.description: Monotube performance shocks with adjustable damping. Sport-tuned for improved handling and reduced body roll.

category_details.name: Off-Road & Lifted Shocks
category_details.description: Heavy-duty shocks with extended travel for lifted trucks, Jeeps, and off-road applications. Reservoir designs for extreme conditions.

category_details.name: Control Arms & Links
category_details.description: Upper and lower control arms, ball joints, tie rod ends, and sway bar links. Heavy-duty bushings and greaseable joints for long service life.

category_details.name: Components by Function
category_details.description: Steering and suspension components organized by function — control arms for wheel positioning, tie rod ends for steering, sway bar links for body control, ball joints for pivot points.

category_details.name: Control Arms
category_details.description: Upper and lower control arms with pressed-in bushings and ball joints. Direct-fit OEM-quality replacement.

category_details.name: Tie Rod Ends
category_details.description: Inner and outer tie rod ends for precise steering response. Greaseable designs for extended service life.

category_details.name: Sway Bar Links
category_details.description: Front and rear sway bar end links with polyurethane or rubber bushings. Reduce body roll in cornering.

category_details.name: Ball Joints
category_details.description: Upper and lower ball joints with sealed or greaseable designs. Heat-treated studs for high load capacity.

category_details.name: Electrical & Sensors
category_details.description: Batteries, alternators, starters, sensors, and wiring for reliable vehicle electrical systems. OE-spec and upgraded components.

category_details.name: Batteries
category_details.description: Automotive batteries in all group sizes with CCA ratings from 500 to 1000+. AGM and flooded lead-acid options. Maintenance-free design.

category_details.name: Batteries by Chemistry
category_details.description: Match battery chemistry to vehicle needs — AGM for modern start-stop and luxury vehicles, flooded lead-acid for traditional applications, EFB for entry-level start-stop systems.

category_details.name: AGM Batteries
category_details.description: Absorbed Glass Mat (AGM) batteries for modern vehicles with start-stop technology. Spill-proof, vibration-resistant, and longer service life.

category_details.name: Flooded Lead-Acid Batteries
category_details.description: Traditional flooded lead-acid automotive batteries. Cost-effective replacement for older vehicles without start-stop technology.

category_details.name: EFB Start-Stop Batteries
category_details.description: Enhanced Flooded Battery (EFB) for entry-level start-stop vehicles. Improved cycle life over standard flooded batteries.

category_details.name: Sensors
category_details.description: Oxygen sensors, MAF sensors, crankshaft position sensors, MAP sensors, and more. OE-fit sensors for every major automotive system.

category_details.name: Sensors by System
category_details.description: Sensors grouped by vehicle system — engine management for ignition and fuel, emissions for catalytic converter health, ABS and wheel speed for traction control.

category_details.name: Engine Management Sensors
category_details.description: MAF, MAP, crankshaft position, camshaft position, and throttle position sensors for engine control module (ECM).

category_details.name: Emissions Sensors
category_details.description: Oxygen sensors, EGR sensors, and catalytic converter temperature sensors. OEM-fit for OBD-II diagnostic compliance.

category_details.name: ABS & Wheel Speed Sensors
category_details.description: ABS wheel speed sensors and ride height sensors for anti-lock braking and stability control systems. Direct-fit OEM replacements.

category_details.name: Fluids & Chemicals
category_details.description: Motor oils, transmission fluids, brake fluids, coolants, and automotive chemicals. Trusted brands for every maintenance interval.

category_details.name: Motor Oil
category_details.description: Conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic motor oils in all viscosities. 5W-30, 0W-20, 10W-40 and specialty grades for diesel and high-mileage engines.

category_details.name: Oils by Formulation
category_details.description: Select motor oil by formulation — full synthetic for modern engines and extreme conditions, synthetic blend for balanced performance, conventional for older engines, high-mileage for vehicles with 75,000+ miles.

category_details.name: Full Synthetic Motor Oil
category_details.description: Premium full-synthetic motor oil engineered for modern engines. Superior protection in extreme heat and cold. Extended drain intervals up to 15,000 miles.

category_details.name: Synthetic Blend Motor Oil
category_details.description: Synthetic-blend motor oil combining conventional and synthetic base stocks. Better wear protection than conventional at a moderate price.

category_details.name: Conventional Motor Oil
category_details.description: Standard conventional motor oil for older engines and budget maintenance. Meets API SP and ILSAC GF-6 specifications.

category_details.name: High-Mileage Motor Oil
category_details.description: Specially formulated motor oil with seal conditioners for vehicles with 75,000+ miles. Reduces oil leaks and burn-off.

category_details.name: Coolants & Antifreeze
category_details.description: Pre-mixed and concentrate coolants in universal and vehicle-specific formulas. Extended-life antifreeze up to 5 years / 150,000 miles.

category_details.name: Coolants by Formula
category_details.description: Choose coolant formula by vehicle compatibility — universal pre-mixed for fast top-off, OEM-specific for warranty-compliant service, extended-life concentrate for custom mix ratios.

category_details.name: Universal Pre-Mixed Coolants
category_details.description: 50/50 pre-mixed universal coolants compatible with all major vehicle manufacturers. Ready to pour, no dilution required.

category_details.name: OEM-Specific Coolants
category_details.description: Vehicle-specific coolants meeting OEM specifications (Dex-Cool, G12++, Asian Long-Life, etc.). Warranty-compliant replacement.

category_details.name: Extended-Life Concentrate Coolants
category_details.description: Concentrated extended-life coolants for custom mix ratios. Up to 5 years / 150,000 miles service life when mixed properly.
